mapper.select: SELECT id, plan_id, day_number, day_label, start_word_order, end_word_order, total_count, status, study_completed_at, last_accuracy, last_correct_count, last_wrong_count, completed_at FROM recite_plan_day WHERE plan_id = #{planId} ORDER BY day_number ASC

SELECT id, plan_id, day_number, day_label, start_word_order, end_word_order, total_count, status, study_completed_at, last_accuracy, last_correct_count, last_wrong_count, completed_at FROM recite_plan_day WHERE plan_id = #{planId} AND day_number = #{dayNumber} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM recite_plan_day WHERE plan_id = #{planId} AND status = 'COMPLETED'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recite_plan_day ( plan_id, day_number, day_label, start_word_order, end_word_order, total_count, status, study_completed_at, last_accuracy, last_correct_count, last_wrong_count, completed_at ) VALUES ( #{planId}, #{dayNumber}, #{dayLabel}, #{startWordOrder}, #{endWordOrder}, #{totalCount}, #{status}, #{studyCompletedAt}, #{lastAccuracy}, #{lastCorrectCount}, #{lastWrongCount}, #{completedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE recite_plan_day SET status = #{status}, study_completed_at = COALESCE(study_completed_at, #{completedAt}), last_accuracy = #{lastAccuracy}, last_correct_count = #{lastCorrectCount}, last_wrong_count = #{lastWrongCount}, completed_at = #{completedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
